name: Tehuelche Confederacies
scope_note: Province-level abstraction for several Patagonian peoples rather than a single centralized state.

name: Papuan Communities
scope_note: Regional authority slot for diverse Papuan communities.

name: Pampas Peoples
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for mobile peoples of the Pampas; Het is treated as a dataset culture label rather than one state.

name: Khoisan Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for Khoekhoe and San communities; not a claim of unified sovereignty.

name: Sakha Communities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for Sakha communities.

name: Samoyedic Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for Nenets Selkup and related Samoyedic communities.

name: Evenki Communities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for Evenki and related Tungusic communities.

name: Huarpe Confederacies
scope_note: Gameplay representation of Huarpe communities and alliances.

name: Lesser Sunda Polities
scope_note: Umbrella slot for local Lesser Sunda rulers and communities where the source lacks individual states.

name: Gran Chaco Peoples
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for multiple Gran Chaco peoples with mobile and overlapping territorial use.

name: Nuu-chah-nulth Communities
scope_note: Corrects the imported broad Aleutian culture label for Nootka.

name: Kwakwaka'wakw Communities
scope_note: Corrects the imported broad Aleutian culture label for Kwakiutl territory.

name: Tlingit Communities
scope_note: Corrects the imported broad Aleutian culture label for Yakutat.

name: Unangan Communities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for Unangan communities.

name: Alutiiq Communities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for Kodiak Alutiiq communities.

name: Dene Nations
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for several northern Dene peoples where province resolution is coarser than individual territories.

name: Bemba Plateau Communities
scope_note: Gameplay territorial authority; does not project the later centralized Bemba state backward into 1444.

name: Jivaroan Peoples
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for Jivaroan communities including Shuar-related groups.

name: Inuit Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for Inuit communities; boundaries are approximate and not modern claims.

name: Khanty Principalities
scope_note: Represents Khanty and related Ob-Ugric principalities and communities.

name: Duala Coastal Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for Sawa Bantu coastal authorities around the Cameroon estuary.

name: Jukun Polities
scope_note: Gameplay representation of Jukun-speaking polities without assuming later Kwararafa borders.

name: Kikuyu Communities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for central Kenyan communities represented by the imported Bantu culture label.

name: Southern Highlands Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for Bena Hehe and neighbouring southern highland communities.

name: Tanzanian Interior Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella where the imported Takama culture groups several interior communities.

name: Nilotic Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for Acholi Lango and neighbouring Nilotic communities at this map resolution.

name: Great Lakes Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for communities represented by the imported Masaba culture label.

name: Tswana Communities
scope_note: Corrects the imported Khoisan culture label for the Tswana province while retaining a separate territorial authority.

name: Formosan Indigenous Communities
scope_note: Corrects the imported Polynesian culture label for Taiwan and represents diverse Formosan Indigenous peoples.

name: Chamorro Communities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for Chamorro communities on Guam.

name: Micronesian Communities
scope_note: Gameplay umbrella for several Micronesian island societies at this map resolution.

name: Tahitian Polities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for Tahitian and Society Islands polities.

name: Rapa Nui Communities
scope_note: Territorial authority slot for Rapa Nui.

name: Andamanese Communities
scope_note: Corrects the imported Filipino culture label for the Indigenous peoples of the Andaman Islands.

name: Nguni Communities
scope_note: Represents 1444 Nguni-speaking communities without projecting the nineteenth-century Zulu kingdom backward.

name: Swazi Communities
scope_note: Separate territorial authority for the Swazi province while avoiding later hard borders.
